subject: Question about your AI agent course
snippet: Hi, I run a 4-person agency in Milan...
body:
Hi,

I run a 4-person agency in Milan. We're spending ~30 hrs/week on client onboarding ops and I think your agent stack could halve that.

Do you take consulting projects, or is the course your only offering right now? Budget is around 5-7k EUR.

Thanks,
Marco
